docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2016 CONTINUED TO NOV-23-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-10-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-23-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-10-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
